inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.select_item_hint: Select an item to see its description.
inventory.quest_no_hotbar: Quest items cannot be moved to the hotbar
inventory.quest_cannot_move: Quest items cannot be moved into the regular inventory

container.title: Container
container.drag_hint: Drag items between the container and your backpack.

hud.controls: WASD | SHIFT | SPACE | ALT | LMB | RMB | LMB+RMB 1.5s | E | 1-5 | I | J | O | K | M

meet_hermit.title: Find the Hermit
meet_hermit.description: Search the forest edge and speak with the local hermit.

enter_forest_edge.title: Reach the Forest Edge
enter_forest_edge.description: After meeting the hermit, continue along the trail.

enter_deep_forest.title: Enter the Deep Forest
enter_deep_forest.description: Push deeper into the woods and find the boss path.

defeat_guardian.title: Defeat the Guardian
defeat_guardian.description: Bring down the Forest Guardian to open the way forward.

movement_basics.title: Learn the Basics
movement_basics.description: Get comfortable with movement around the meadow. Walk the paths, feel the pace, and practice a few dashes.

field_supplies.title: Gather Field Supplies
field_supplies.description: Try interacting with the world around you. Pick up enough simple materials to prepare for your first real craft.

first_weapon.title: Craft Your First Weapon
first_weapon.description: Open the crafting menu, check what you can make, and assemble a stone spear for the road ahead.

beetle_cull.title: Thin the Beetles
beetle_cull.description: The meadow is crawling with armored beetles. Clear a handful of them to make the path safer.

predator_cleanup.title: Drive Back the Predators
predator_cleanup.description: The deeper trail is watched by hunters from the air and ground. Deal with the wasps and spiders nearby.

reach_forest_edge.title: Move On to the Forest Edge
reach_forest_edge.description: Once you are ready, leave the meadow behind and step into the next area.

strange_wells.title: Study the Strange Wells
strange_wells.description: The old stone wells hum with unfamiliar power. Find the one that carries you onward.
strange_wells.objective: Step into the strange well and follow its pull: {current}/{required}

spider_den.title: Thin the Spider Den
spider_den.description: Clear enough of the spider nest to gather silk for a proper bowstring.

craft_bow.title: Craft a Bow
craft_bow.description: Use the silk you gathered and assemble a bow fit for the deeper forest.

find_magic_well.title: Find the Magic Well
find_magic_well.description: Somewhere in the forest edge there is a well that leads deeper into the woods.
find_magic_well.objective: Find the magic well and enter the deep forest: {current}/{required}

speak_with_guardian.title: Find the Forest Guardian
speak_with_guardian.description: Track down the guardian of the forest and confront him face to face.
speak_with_guardian.objective: Reach the Forest Guardian and speak with him: {current}/{required}

vitality_1.name: Vitality I
vitality_1.description: A tougher body helps you survive the first bad trade.

vitality_2.name: Vitality II
vitality_2.description: Further hardens you for longer fights.

iron_skin.name: Iron Skin
iron_skin.description: Simple resilience that blunts incoming hits.

endurance_1.name: Endurance I
endurance_1.description: A steadier breath extends your stamina pool.

endurance_2.name: Endurance II
endurance_2.description: Lets you keep pressure for a bit longer.

bow_focus.name: Bow Focus
bow_focus.description: Cleaner releases and better ranged damage.

edge_1.name: Sharpened Edge I
edge_1.description: Basic offensive training raises attack power.

edge_2.name: Sharpened Edge II
edge_2.description: Builds on the first lessons with stronger strikes.

heavy_form.name: Heavy Form
heavy_form.description: Improves control over committed heavy swings.

footwork.name: Footwork
footwork.description: Better movement and cleaner spacing in fights.

battle_flow.name: Battle Flow
battle_flow.description: You stay more mobile during your attacks.

hunter_draw.name: Hunter Draw
hunter_draw.description: You charge shots faster and spend less stamina.

relentless.name: Relentless
relentless.description: Charged attacks hit harder and recover faster.

relentless_2.name: Relentless 2
relentless_2.description: Charged attacks hit harder and recover faster.

consumables.cannot_use: The selected item cannot be used

saves.new_hint: Type a name and press Enter to start a new run.
saves.continue_hint: Select a save slot, then choose an action.
saves.delete_failed: Failed to delete the selected save.
saves.load_failed: Failed to load the selected save.
saves.create_failed: Failed to create a save slot.

pickup.no_map: You do not have a map yet.

knowledge_shard.name: Knowledge Shard
knowledge_shard.description: A shard of knowledge used to unlock advanced recipes.

healing_infusion.name: Healing Infusion
healing_infusion.description: Restores 4 health per second for 8 seconds.

stamina_infusion.name: Stamina Infusion
stamina_infusion.description: Restores 6 stamina per second for 8 seconds.

web_wrap.name: Web Wrap
web_wrap.description: Sticky binding made from spider silk.

beetle_charm.name: Beetle Charm
beetle_charm.description: A small charm from beetle shell and bone.

beetle_shell.name: Beetle Shell
beetle_shell.description: A hard piece of beetle shell.

small_backpack.name: Small Backpack
small_backpack.description: A small travel backpack from the hermit.

map.name: Map
map.description: A magical map that remembers opened places.

stone_spear.name: Spear
stone_spear.description: A long spear with a sharpened stone head.

short_bow.name: Bow
short_bow.description: A simple bow for ranged combat.

stone_spear.name: Stone Spear
stone_spear.description: A sturdy branch tipped with sharpened stone. Reliable reach for early fights.

short_bow.name: Short Bow
short_bow.description: A simple hunting bow bound from sticks, bark and spider webbing.

berry_mix.name: Berry Mix
berry_mix.description: A small field ration made from berries and seeds.

forest_bandage.name: Forest Bandage
forest_bandage.description: Bound grass and bark for simple wound care.

web_wrap.name: Web Wrap
web_wrap.description: A sticky web binding for stronger field repairs.

beetle_charm.name: Beetle Charm
beetle_charm.description: A tiny forest talisman assembled from light monster remains.

healing_tonic_recipe.name: Healing Tonic
healing_tonic_recipe.description: Crushed berries and a fresh bud brewed into a quick restorative tonic.

healing_infusion_recipe.name: Healing Infusion
healing_infusion_recipe.description: A stronger healing brew steeped from berries, petals and mushroom flesh.

stamina_tonic_recipe.name: Stamina Tonic
stamina_tonic_recipe.description: A brisk tonic made from mushroom and meadow herbs to keep you moving.

stamina_infusion_recipe.name: Stamina Infusion
stamina_infusion_recipe.description: A concentrated field infusion that trades rarity for a longer-lasting kick.
